declaration-no-important.message: !important is not allowed — use the @layer cascade or a more specific selector.

selector-max-id.message: ID selectors are not allowed — style elements, [data-*] attributes, or .ph-* icons.

unit-disallowed-list.message: Print/absolute units are not allowed — use rem, em, %, vw, or dvh.

property-disallowed-list.message: float/clear are not allowed — use the grid (place-* / [data-colspan]).

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: display: table* is not allowed — use grid or flex.

custom-property-pattern.message: Custom properties must use the soil token vocabulary (e.g. --accent-up, --text-mute, --m). See soil/PAUMEN.css :root.
